name: sidequests
description: An open-source sink of reusable, project-agnostic agent-ops tooling + Claude Code skills, born as side quests. 23 skills across agent orchestration & multi-agent coordination (agent-task-pickup, agent-coordination-gates, anti-idle-anti-stall, two-agent-build-test-loop, agentic-best-practices), watchers & durable automation (watcher-reliability, watcher-cleanup, durable-claude-automation), agile-scrum SDLC (feature, bugfix, releasing, receipts), context & memory (session-context, memory-compaction, context-engine), usage & cost control (usage-limit-guard, github-actions-cost-control), gaming rig & desktop (steam-shortcut, hdr-gaming-setup, display-off-shortcut, isolated-streaming-host-mock), and the original media/migration side quests (photo-reconciler, source-finder).
